To get OptiScaler to work with REFramework UpscalerBasePlugin: . Download REFramework's <s>pd-upscaler branch</s> . _Currently newer versions of REF PD are broken in DMC5, so use this last working one instead_ - link . Download PureDark's UpscalerBasePlugin 1.1.2 (as 1.2.0 doesn't load the back-end properly). . Extract REFramework, UpscalerBasePlugin, and OptiScaler (Nvidia cards also need nvngx_dlss.dll) to the game folder. PDPerfPlugin.dll _from UpscalerBasePlugin also goes onto the root - REF's dinput8.dll, OptiScaler.dll and PDPerfPlugin.dll all need to be by the game exe_ . Run the OptiScaler setup file and install as dxgi.dll or version.dll _Final folder screenshot_

As of Ver. 1.1.2, the game still doesn't feature DLSS Frame Generation, FSR 3 Frame Generation and Nvidia Reflex. However, the game contains those necessary plugins; it's just not visible in the Graphics Settings to the end user. To enable them, go to C:\Users\[User Name]\App Data\Local\MGSDelta\Saved\Config\Windows and click on Engine.ini. Scroll all the way to the bottom and add the following lines below (the ones starting with [SystemSettings]).

After adding those lines, add Nukem's dlss-to-fsr3-amd-is-better.dll and FakeMichau's fakenvapi into the root game folder and you'll see both DLSSG and Anti-Lag 2/XeLL running. DLSS Frame Gen On, Reflex On, and Reflex On (not On Boost) Mode Selected: [SystemSettings] r.Streamline.DLSSG.Enable=1 t.Streamline.Reflex.Enable=1 t.Streamline.Reflex.Mode=1 FSR 3 Frame Gen: [SystemSettings] r.FidelityFX.FI.Enabled=1

To get OptiScaler to work with REFramework UpscalerBasePlugin: . Download REFramework's pd-upscaler branch. . Download PureDark's UpscalerBasePlugin 1.1.2 (as 1.2.0 doesn't load the back-end properly). . Extract REFramework, UpscalerBasePlugin, and OptiScaler (Nvidia cards also need nvngx_dlss.dll) to the game folder. PDPerfPlugin.dll _from UpscalerBasePlugin also goes onto the root - REF's dinput8.dll, OptiScaler.dll and PDPerfPlugin.dll all need to be by the game exe_ . Run the OptiScaler setup file and install as dxgi.dll or version.dll _Final folder screenshot_

Recommended to change either REFramework's or OptiScaler's shortcut keys as they both use the same key: REFramework: Configuration -> Menu Key. OptiScaler: set ShortcutKey=0x24 (changes to home key, follow instructions above that line for other keys) in OptiScaler.ini.

Alternate Method 1 — using Ultimate ASI Loader: . Rename REFramework's dinput8.dll to REF.asi. . Install OptiScaler as OptiScaler.asi. . Download and extract Ultimate ASI Loader to game folder. . PDPerfPlugin.dll should either be in the game folder or in reframework\plugins. Folder structure example: 1.

Alternate Method 2 — using REFramework to load OptiScaler: . Create a reframework folder, then a plugins folder inside that folder. . Move PDPerfPlugin.dll and the OptiScaler files to the reframework/plugins folder (running the OptiScaler setup is unnecessary with this method). Folder structure example: 1. In-game screenshots: 1, 2.
UpscalerBasePlugin cannot isolate the HUD, so it also gets upscaled.
